message:
perf(spec-evolution): cache dynamic imports as singleton promises and load in parallel

The viewer was re-importing marked, DOMPurify, and diff2html on every
render cycle, creating new module-loading promises each time. This caused
redundant network fetches and parse overhead.

- Cache each dynamic import promise in a module-level singleton variable
  using nullish coalescing assignment (??=) so the import() call only
  fires once per page lifetime
- Use Promise.all() to load marked+DOMPurify in parallel for spec HTML
  rendering, and diff2html+diff2html/lib/types+DOMPurify in parallel for
  diff rendering, cutting wall-clock time roughly in half vs sequential
  awaits
- Extracted helper functions getMarkedModule(), getDomPurifyModule(),
  getDiff2HtmlModule(), getDiff2HtmlTypesModule() for clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
